title: viola orbelica
intro: Viola orbelica, also known as the Bulgarian or Beloribic violet, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the violet family and is native to Bulgaria. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Viola orbelica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various conditions, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
